text:
Speech - absence of spoken words, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
151 C6 C6_UNDERSTAND_OTH (C6) Ability to Understand Others CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: ability to understand others. 0 = Understands; 1 = Usually Understands - may miss some part/intent of message; 2 = Sometimes Understands - responds adequately to simple, direct communication; 3 = Rarely/Never Understands; "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
152 C7 C7_CHANGE_IN_COMM (C7) Change in Communication/Hearing CHAR 1
